artifacts.summary: Determines task 92 is PARTIAL: commit a8f65ad already removed logos-labels from Group logos, fixing the whole-group crash on the dotted Gmail-import label name (proposal part 1's intent, though logos-folders was kept rather than also excluded). Proposal parts 2 (Group logos-full) and 3 (negative dotted-name patterns on logos-labels/logos-folders) were never implemented, and part 3's absence means the commit's own claim that logos-labels is safe for 'manual inspection' is not actually true yet.

next_steps: Decide with the user whether to narrow task 92 to the two remaining residual items (Group logos-full + negative dotted-name patterns) and route to /plan, or mark task 92 ABANDONED citing a8f65ad as having resolved the operationally significant part of the bug.

key_findings.relevant_commit: a8f65ad (2026-07-05, landed via nvim task 826, not task 92)
